A Pirate's Adventure ~ Treasures of the.description: An interactive treasure hunt through Adventureland where guests use a magic talisman and map to complete pirate raids and uncover hidden treasures.

Swiss Family Treehouse.description: A self-guided walkthrough of the shipwrecked Swiss Family Robinson's 60-foot treehouse, featuring open-air rooms filled with 19th-century salvaged furnishings.
Swiss Family Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb 116 stairs; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A classic Audio-Animatronic show where over 200 tropical birds, flowers, and tiki figures sing and perform in an immersive Polynesian-themed theater.

Casey Jr. Splash 'N' Soak Station.description: A circus train-themed splash pad where elephants, monkeys, and camels spray water at guests while Casey Jr. lets off billows of refreshing steam.

Cinderella Castle.description: The iconic 189-foot castle landmark featuring a walkthrough mosaic gallery with over a million pieces of Italian glass, real silver, and 14-karat gold.

Enchanted Tales with Belle.description: An interactive storytelling experience where guests journey through Maurice's workshop to Beast's library and help Belle retell her tale with props and costumes.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert film where Donald Duck dons Mickey's sorcerer hat and tumbles through classic Disney musical scenes on the world's largest purpose-built 3D screen.

Jessie's Roundup: A Rip-Roarin' Revue!.description: A lively interactive Toy Story experience at the Diamond Horseshoe where guests craft, dance, yodel, and perform alongside Jessie, Woody, and friends.

Main Street Vehicles.description: Vintage transportation along Main Street U.S.A. featuring horse-drawn trolleys, an omnibus, jitney, horseless carriage, and a fire engine.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must climb steps to board; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Carousel of Progress.description: A revolving theater show spanning four acts that follows an Audio-Animatronic family through a century of technological progress and everyday life.

Meet Ariel at Her Grotto.description: Greet Ariel in her mermaid form on a seashell throne inside a seaside grotto beneath Prince Eric's Castle.

Meet Cinderella and Princess Tiana at Pr.description: Meet Cinderella and Princess Tiana in an ornate royal hall adorned with chandeliers, banners, and elegant arches in the Castle Courtyard.

Meet Visiting Princesses at Princess Fai.description: Meet visiting Disney Princesses such as Rapunzel, Belle, or Snow White in a royal hall decorated with iron gates and colorful banners.

Meet Mickey at Town Square Theater.description: Meet Mickey Mouse in his magician costume inside his backstage dressing room, complete with props and posters from his theatrical career.

Meet Daring Disney Pals as Circus Stars.description: Meet Goofy as The Great Goofini and Donald as The Astounding Donaldo in their circus performer costumes inside an air-conditioned tent.

Meet Dashing Disney Pals as Circus Stars.description: Meet Minnie as Minnie Magnifique and Daisy as Madame Daisy Fortuna in their circus performer costumes inside an air-conditioned tent.

AMAZU: Treetop Adventure.description: A raised adventure trail through the AMAZU habitat where children climb, swing, and slide among real spider and squirrel monkeys.
AMAZU: Treetop Adventure.accessibility: Treetop area not wheelchair accessible; ground-level play area available

Canopy Capers.description: A fantasy treehouse rope bridge attraction where children navigate bouncing walkways, suspended bridges, and tunnels high above the ground.

Dragon's Playhouse - Soft Play.description: A large indoor soft play centre with slides, ball pits, climbing frames, and a bouncy castle, split into toddler and junior zones.
Dragon's Playhouse - Soft Play.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible at ground level; socks required, no shoes

Room on the Broom - A Magical Journey.description: An interactive walkthrough inside Burnt Stub Mansion where families help the Witch find her lost belongings through scenes with animatronics and projection mapping.

Rubble & Rocky's Play Zone.description: A construction and recycling themed play area where children climb, slide, and explore alongside Rubble's dig site and Rocky's recycle yard.

Awesome Planet.description: A 10-minute environmental film narrated by Ty Burrell showcasing Earth's beauty with in-theater wind, scent, and water effects.

Canada Far and Wide in Circle-Vision 360.description: A 360-degree standing film tour of Canada's landscapes narrated by Catherine O'Hara and Eugene Levy, shown on screens surrounding the audience.
Canada Far and Wide in Circle-Vision 360.accessibility: Wheelchair and ECV accessible; standing room with leaning rails

Disney and Pixar Short Film Festival.description: A 4D theater experience featuring three animated shorts with in-theater effects including water spray and rumbling seats.

GoofyCore at CommuniCore Hall.description: A seasonal Goofy-themed takeover of CommuniCore Hall featuring DJ dance parties, interactive games, and activities for kids.

Journey of Water, Inspired by Moana.description: An interactive self-guided walkthrough teaching guests about the water cycle through whimsical Moana-themed water features and play areas.
Journey of Water, Inspired by Moana.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible on dry path only

SeaBase Aquarium.description: A 5.7-million-gallon ocean habitat housing over 2,000 animals and 90 marine species including sea turtles, sharks, rays, and manatees.

Meet Anna and Elsa at Royal Sommerhus.description: Meet Queen Elsa and Princess Anna individually in their cozy Norwegian summer cabin filled with childhood memorabilia from Arendelle.

Meet Asha Near World Showcase Plaza.description: Meet Asha from Disney's Wish near the World Showcase Plaza for photos and autographs.

Meet Beloved Disney Pals at Mickey & Fri.description: Meet Mickey Mouse and other beloved Disney characters for photos and autographs near the park entrance.

Meet Donald Duck in Mexico.description: Meet Donald Duck dressed in his Three Caballeros outfit inside the Mexico Pavilion's pyramid.

Meet Figment Inside ImageWorks.description: Meet the beloved purple dragon Figment inside the ImageWorks interactive play area at the Imagination Pavilion.

Meet Mulan in China.description: Meet Mulan in her warrior attire inside the China Pavilion at World Showcase.

Meet Pluto Near EPCOT Main Entrance.description: Meet Pluto for photos and autographs near the main entrance of EPCOT.

Meet Princess Aurora in France.description: Meet Sleeping Beauty's Princess Aurora in the France Pavilion at World Showcase.

Vacation Fun - An Original Animated Shor.description: A 10-minute animated short film where Mickey and Minnie share vacation memories, shown in a theater with a post-show photo op area.

Walt Disney Presents.description: A self-guided walkthrough gallery with over 400 Walt Disney artifacts and memorabilia, ending with a 15-minute biographical film narrated by Julie Andrews.

Meet Ariel at Walt Disney Presents.description: Meet Ariel in her human-form princess dress inside Walt Disney Presents for photos and autographs.

Meet Disney Stars at Red Carpet Dreams.description: Meet beloved Disney and Pixar characters in a glamorous Hollywood-style red carpet setting for photos and autographs.

Meet Edna Mode at the Edna Mode Experien.description: Tour Edna Mode's Super-Suit Gallery featuring Incredibles costumes and concept art, then meet the legendary designer herself.

Meet Olaf at Celebrity Spotlight.description: Meet the lovable snowman Olaf from Frozen at Celebrity Spotlight for warm hugs and photos.

Animal Care at Conservation Station.description: A behind-the-scenes look at Disney's animal care with live veterinary treatment rooms, a nursery, nutrition lab, and science center exhibits.
Animal Care at Conservation Station.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; requires Wildlife Express Train

Discovery Island Trails.description: Self-guided walking trails around the Tree of Life featuring animal exhibits, waterfalls, wooden bridges, and cave-like tunnels.

Gorilla Falls Exploration Trail.description: A self-guided walking trail through African wildlife habitats featuring lowland gorillas, hippos, okapi, exotic birds, and naked mole-rats.

The Oasis Exhibits.description: Lush tropical gardens and animal habitats at the park entrance featuring exotic birds, giant anteaters, wallabies, and other wildlife.

Tree of Life.description: The park's iconic 145-foot centerpiece featuring over 300 hand-carved animals, surrounded by pools, meadows, and live animal habitats.

Wilderness Explorers.description: A free self-guided scavenger hunt where guests complete activities and earn over 25 badges by observing animals and learning about conservation.

Meet Favorite Disney Pals at Adventurers.description: Meet Mickey and Minnie Mouse in their safari explorer outfits at a rustic outpost filled with travel souvenirs and adventure gear.

Meet Moana at Character Landing.description: Meet Moana at Character Landing near the Discovery Island waterfront for photos and autographs.

Adventureland Treehouse inspired by Walt.description: A self-guided walkthrough of a towering treehouse featuring themed rooms and scenic views of Adventureland from high above.
Adventureland Treehouse inspired by Walt.accessibility: Must be ambulatory; many stairs with no elevator

Donald's Duck Pond.description: A whimsical splash pad and play area with computer-controlled fountains and Donald Duck's two-story boat to explore.

Frontierland Shootin' Exposition.description: An Old West shooting gallery where guests fire infrared rifles at nearly 100 animated targets in a frontier town scene.
Frontierland Shootin' Exposition.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; guests may remain in wheelchair/ECV

Goofy's How-to-Play Yard.description: A colorful play area inside and around Goofy's house featuring slides, climbing structures, sound gardens, and interactive props.
Goofy's How-to-Play Yard.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; some play structures require climbing

Great Moments with Mr. Lincoln.description: A patriotic Audio-Animatronic presentation featuring a lifelike President Abraham Lincoln delivering excerpts from famous speeches.

Main Street Cinema.description: A small theater continuously screening classic Disney animated shorts including Steamboat Willie across six screens.

Main Street Vehicles.description: A one-way ride down Main Street U.S.A. aboard vintage horse-drawn streetcars, fire engines, and horseless carriages.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must transfer from wheelchair/ECV to board vehicle

Meet Disney Princesses at Royal Hall.description: Meet up to three Disney Princesses for photos and autographs inside the ornate Royal Hall at Fantasy Faire.

Mickey's House and Meet Mickey Mouse.description: Walk through Mickey Mouse's cartoon home in Toontown, then meet Mickey in person for photos and autographs.

Minnie's House.description: A self-guided walkthrough of Minnie Mouse's whimsical Toontown home with interactive furniture and room details.

Opera House - Walt Disney - A Magical Li.description: An exhibit and Audio-Animatronic show celebrating Walt Disney's life, featuring artifacts from the Walt Disney Archives and Family Museum.

Pirate's Lair on Tom Sawyer Island.description: A pirate-themed island playground accessible by raft, featuring caves, trails, bridges, and interactive scenes.
Pirate's Lair on Tom Sawyer Island.accessibility: Rafts and main paths wheelchair accessible; caves and lookout points are not

Pixar Short Film Spotlight.description: A screening of three Pixar animated short films in a comfortable air-conditioned theater at Tomorrowland.

Sleeping Beauty Castle Walkthrough.description: A walkthrough inside Sleeping Beauty Castle featuring dioramas that retell the story of Princess Aurora with special effects.
Sleeping Beauty Castle Walkthrough.accessibility: Must be ambulatory for walkthrough; virtual version available for wheelchair users

The Disney Gallery.description: A rotating gallery showcasing Disney concept art, original artwork, and behind-the-scenes materials from the parks and films.

Walt Disney - A Magical Life.description: An Audio-Animatronic tribute to Walt Disney set in a replica of his Burbank office, paired with a biographical film.

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A musical Audio-Animatronic show featuring over 150 tropical birds, flowers, and tiki gods singing and performing.

Animation Academy.description: A hands-on drawing class led by a Disney artist where guests learn to sketch a popular Disney character and keep their artwork.

Games of Pixar Pier.description: Four Pixar-themed boardwalk carnival games including La Luna Star Catcher, Heimlich's Candy Corn Toss, and more.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert film featuring Donald Duck chasing Mickey's sorcerer hat through scenes from beloved Disney films with in-theater effects.
Mickey's PhilharMagic.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; assistive listening and captioning available

Redwood Creek Challenge Trail.description: A forest-themed outdoor play area with rope bridges, rock climbing walls, zip lines, slides, and winding nature trails.
Redwood Creek Challenge Trail.accessibility: Accessible paths marked on map; some areas require climbing. Rock climb: 42"; slides: 32"

Sorcerer's Workshop.description: Interactive walkthrough exhibits inside the Animation Building where guests explore animation techniques and Disney art.

The Bakery Tour.description: A self-guided walking tour through a working Boudin sourdough bakery with free bread samples and behind-the-glass views.

Meet Chef Goofy.description: Meet Goofy dressed in chef attire during the Disney California Adventure Food & Wine Festival.

Meet Disney Pals on Buena Vista Street.description: Meet classic Disney characters dressed in vintage Hollywood-era outfits along Buena Vista Street.

Meet the Residents of Radiator Springs i.description: Meet Lightning McQueen, Mater, and other Cars characters in the immersive Radiator Springs setting.
